scripts.build: npx @tailwindcss/cli -i ./input.css -o ./style.css --minify && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const css=fs.readFileSync('style.css', 'utf8'); const siteUrl = process.env.SITE_URL || 'https://border-bot-landing-page.pages.dev'; ['index.html', 'ru.html'].forEach(f => { let html=fs.readFileSync(f, 'utf8'); html=html.replace('<link rel=\x22stylesheet\x22 href=\x22style.css\x22>', '<style>' + css + '</style>').replaceAll('{{SITE_URL}}', siteUrl); fs.writeFileSync(f, html); });"
